title: Agent Skills Standard and SKILL.md Anatomy · Threat Case: Instructions
summary: Create a minimal standards-conforming skill for a repeated review workflow. Planned artifact: Add and verify the agent ext instructions increment in a valid focused agent skill. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Write imperative workflow steps, boundaries, inputs, outputs, and verification criteria.
Write valid name and description metadata within specification constraints.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
